zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Woodthorpe於大約1230年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾薩利比時，她的父親WILLIAM DE WOODTHORPE II11歲，母親Alice of Lancashire18歲。她於1268年與William de Kirkton在英國林可爾史爾盧斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1303年在英國林可爾史爾吉爾頓享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de Woodthorpe于大约1230年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾薩利比时，她的父亲WILLIAM DE WOODTHORPE II11岁，母亲Alice of Lancashire18岁。她于1268年与William de Kirkton在英国林可爾史爾盧斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1303年在英国林可爾史爾吉爾頓享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Woodthorpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name mainly from Woodthorpe in Strubby (Lincs), though occasionally from Woodthorpe in Loughborough (Leics). There is no evidence to suggest that the surname could be from other like-named places, such as Woodthorpe, Woodthorpe in Staveley (Derbys), Woodthorpe Hall in Handsworth, or Woodthorpe in Sandal Magna (WR Yorks), except perhaps for the early bearer from 1251–2.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Woodthorpe was born about 1230, in Saleby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, WILLIAM DE WOODTHORPE II, was 11 and her mother, Alice of Lancashire, was 18. She married William de Kirkton in 1268, in Louth, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1303, in Kirton, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth de Woodthorpe est née environ 1230, à Saleby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, WILLIAM DE WOODTHORPE II, avait 11 ans et sa mère, Alice of Lancashire, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé William de Kirkton en 1268, à Louth, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1303, à Kirton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth de Woodthorpe um 1230 in Saleby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater WILLIAM DE WOODTHORPE II 11 und ihre Mutter Alice of Lancashire 18. Sie hat 1268 in Louth, Lincolnshire, England William de Kirkton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1303 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Kirton, Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Woodthorpe è nata il circa 1230 nel Saleby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, WILLIAM DE WOODTHORPE II, aveva 11 anni e sua madre, Alice of Lancashire, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato William de Kirkton nel 1268, nel Louth, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1303, nel Kirton, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Woodthorpeが約1230年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアサレビーで生まれた時，父WILLIAM DE WOODTHORPE IIは11歳，母Alice of Lancashireは18歳であった。1268年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアロウスでWilliam de Kirktonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1303年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアキルトンで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Woodthorpe(이)가 대략 1230년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 살일비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 WILLIAM DE WOODTHORPE II(은)는 11세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice of Lancashire(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1268년 영국 링코실르 루스에서 William de Kirkton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1303년 영국 링코실르 커턴에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Woodthorpe nasceu aproximadamente 1230, em Saleby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, WILLIAM DE WOODTHORPE II, tinha 11 anos e sua mãe, Alice of Lancashire, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Kirkton em 1268, em Louth, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1303, em Kirton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Woodthorpe родилась около 1230 г. в местности сеилеби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени WILLIAM DE WOODTHORPE II было 11 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice of Lancashire, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Kirkton в 1268 г. в местности лоут, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1303 г. в местности киртон, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth de Woodthorpe nació aproximadamente 1230, en Saleby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, WILLIAM DE WOODTHORPE II, tenía 11 años y su mamá, Alice of Lancashire, tenía 18 años. Se casó con William de Kirkton en 1268, en Louth, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1303, en Kirton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 74 años.
